name: Financial Due Diligence Intake
description: Financial due diligence intake for acquirers, investors, and advisors initiating a financial due diligence process. Evaluates the transaction context, scope of financial review, data room readiness, quality of earnings focus areas, key risk areas, and workstream coordination to produce a financial due diligence intake profile with scope definition and risk flags.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
